summary: All sensitive files are properly untracked from git. The .gitignore patterns provide permanent protection against re-tracking. Files remain on disk for operational use.

product_yaml_files.sensitive_content: Absolute filesystem paths, internal port numbers, env var names

dot_claude_directory.sensitive_content: Server IPs (95.217.227.164, 62.109.14.209), LXC addresses (10.10.10.2), internal ports (8094, 8095), Chrome Extension App ID

bananzabot_env.sensitive_content: Telegram bot token, OpenAI API key, Hydra image generation key, Pyrogram session credentials

remaining_risks.risk: Git history still contains sensitive data
remaining_risks.mitigation: Commit bce0eed includes IMPORTANT notice for repo owner to (1) rotate credentials and (2) clean git history with git filter-repo or BFG before making repo public. This is outside task scope — documented as manual step.

pre_commit_hook_improvement.description: Security precommit check (test_security_precommit.js) was fixed to use --name-status and exclude D (deleted) entries, preventing false positives when untracking .env files
